#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, when, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format, to_date
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, sum, regexp_replace

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Gold_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
print(SynapseDedicatedServer)
print(TempFolder)
print(SynapseDedicatedDatabase)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_gold =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_gold:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
# Table FactBillableUsage : START

#Set table name
db_tablename="FactBillableUsage"
source_dbname = "aemo_silver"
source_tablename = "nem12_silver"
source_dbname_lf = "silver"
source_tablename_lf = "loss_factors"
source_tablename_nmilf = "nmi_loss_factor"
source_tablename_nmirel = "nmi_nmi_relationship"
source_tablename_nmirole = "nmi"

# Load nem12_silver data into separate data frame
df_gold = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                       aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalDate, 
                                        aemo.IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.IntervalIndex,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.DisplayTimestamp_d,
                                        aemo.DateHashId, 
                                        aemo.NormalizedTimeStart,
                                        aemo.NormalizedTimeEnd,
                                        aemo.TimeHashId,
                                        LEFT(aemo.NMISuffix,1) AS Suffix,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.Usage_d, 
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        msatslf.TNI, 
                                        msatslf.DLFCode, 
                                        msatslf.Status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.nmi, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msatslf.SequenceNumber DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmilf} msatslf 
                                        ON aemo.nmi = msatslf.nmi 
                                           AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msatslf.ValidFrom_D AS DATE) AND CAST(msatslf.ValidTo_D AS DATE)
                                           AND msatslf.RowStatus = 'A' AND msatslf.ParticipantId = 'CLEANCOR'
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1

# Create EndTimeHashId
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("TimeIndex",regexp_replace("NormalizedTimeEnd",":",""))
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("TimeIndex", col("TimeIndex").cast("integer"))
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("EndTimeHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","TimeIndex"),256))

# Rename TimeHashId to StartTimeHashId
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("StartTimeHashId", col('TimeHashId'))

# Convert IntervalDate to date format
df_gold = df_gold.withColumn("Date",to_date("IntervalDate",'yyyyMMdd'))

# Pivot the 'Suffix' column into separate columns
df_gold_pvt = df_gold.groupBy("NMI","Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",
                              "QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","DLFCode","TNI","Status").pivot("Suffix").agg(sum("Usage"))

# Replace NULL values in usage
df_gold_pvt = df_gold_pvt.na.fill({'E':0})
df_gold_pvt = df_gold_pvt.na.fill({'B':0})

# Calculated field to derive the net usage measure
df_gold_netkwh = df_gold_pvt.withColumn("Net_kWh",col('E')-col('B'))
df_gold_netkwh = df_gold_netkwh.withColumn('NetkWh_usage',col('Net_kWh'))

# Load DLF and TLF values into separate data frame
df_dlf_tlf = spark.sql(f"""
                WITH RankedRows AS (
                    SELECT *, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY LossFactorCode, FromDate, RegionId ORDER BY VersionNo desc) AS rn
                    FROM {source_dbname_lf}.{source_tablename_lf}
                    )
                    SELECT  LossFactorCode,
                            LossFactorValue,
                            FromDate,
                            ToDate,
                            RecordSourceTableName                       
                    FROM RankedRows
                    WHERE rn = 1
df_dlf_tlf = df_dlf_tlf.na.fill({'LossFactorValue':1})

# Join for DLF Value
df_dlf_usage = df_gold_netkwh.join(
    df_dlf_tlf.filter(col("RecordSourceTableName") == "distributionlossfactor"), 
    [(col('DLFCode') ==  col('LossFactorCode')) & (col("Date").between(col("FromDate"),col("ToDate")))],
    'left'

df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.withColumn("DLFUsage",col('NetkWh_usage')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_dlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.select('NMI','Date','IntervalDate','DateHashId','IntervalLength','IntervalIndex','NormalizedTimeStart','StartTimeHashId','NormalizedTimeEnd','EndTimeHashId',
                                    'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','DLFCode','TNI','Status',col('LossFactorValue').alias('DLFValue'),'Net_kWh','DLFUsage')

# Join for TLF Value
df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_usage.join(
    df_dlf_tlf.filter(col("RecordSourceTableName") == "transmissionlossfactor"), 
    [(col('TNI') == col('LossFactorCode')) & (col("Date").between(col("FromDate"),col("ToDate")))],
    'left'

df_dlf_tlf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.withColumn("DLFTLFUsage",col('DLFUsage')*col('LossFactorValue'))
df_lf_usage = df_dlf_tlf_usage.select('NMI','Date','IntervalDate','DateHashId','IntervalLength','IntervalIndex','NormalizedTimeStart','StartTimeHashId','NormalizedTimeEnd','EndTimeHashId',
                                        'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','DLFCode','DLFValue','TNI',col('LossFactorValue').alias('TLFValue'),'Status','Net_kWh','DLFTLFUsage')

# Load NMI Role data into separate data frame
df_nmi_role = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT 
        NMI AS RoleNMI,
        NMIRole,
        CAST(ValidFrom_D AS date) RoleValidFromDate,
        CAST(ValidTo_D AS date) RoleValidToDate   
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmirole}
    WHERE Party in ('CLEANCO', 'CLEANCOR') and RowStatus = 'A'

# Filter LR role and get the respective child NMIs
df_lr = df_lf_usage.join(
    df_nmi_role.filter(col("NMIRole") == "LR"),
    [(df_lf_usage.NMI == df_nmi_role.RoleNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RoleValidFromDate"),col("RoleValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# Load nmi_nmi_relationship data into separate data frame
df_nmi_rel = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT 
        NMI AS ChildNMI,
        ParentNMI,
        CAST(ValidFrom_D AS date) RelValidFromDate,
        CAST(ValidTo_D AS date) RelValidToDate,
        ENID      
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename_nmirel}
    WHERE RowStatus = 'A'

# Get the parent NMI for the child NMIs with LR role
df_child_lr = df_lr.join(
    df_nmi_rel,
    [(df_lr.NMI == df_nmi_rel.ChildNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RelValidFromDate"),col("RelValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# add usage for the Date, IntervalIndex, ParentNMI combination
df_child_lr_usage = df_child_lr.groupBy("Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",
                                        "QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","ParentNMI","DLFCode","DLFValue","TNI","TLFValue","Status").agg(
                                            sum("Net_kWh").alias("prelfusage"),
                                            sum("DLFTLFUsage").alias("postlfusage")
                                            )
                                            
df_child_lr_usage = df_child_lr_usage.select("Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",col("ParentNMI").alias("NMI"),
                                            "QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","DLFCode","DLFValue","TNI","TLFValue","Status","prelfusage","postlfusage",lit("childusage").alias("role"))

# Filter FRMP role and get the respective NMIs
df_frmp = df_lf_usage.join(
    df_nmi_role.filter(col("NMIRole") == "FRMP"),
    [(df_lf_usage.NMI == df_nmi_role.RoleNMI) & (col("Date").between(col("RoleValidFromDate"),col("RoleValidToDate")))],
    'inner'

# add usage for the Date, IntervalIndex and NMI combination
df_frmp_usage = df_frmp.groupBy("Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",
                                "NMI","QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","DLFCode","DLFValue","TNI","TLFValue","Status").agg(
                                            sum("Net_kWh").alias("prelfusage"),
                                            sum("DLFTLFUsage").alias("postlfusage")
                                            )

df_frmp_usage = df_frmp_usage.select("Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",
                                    "NMI","QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","DLFCode","DLFValue","TNI","TLFValue","Status","prelfusage","postlfusage",lit("parentusage").alias("role"))

# Perform the union
df_usage_union = df_frmp_usage.union(df_child_lr_usage) 

# Pivot the 'role' column into separate columns, aggregating by pre and post lossfactor usage
df_usage = df_usage_union.groupBy("Date","IntervalDate","DateHashId","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","NormalizedTimeStart","StartTimeHashId","NormalizedTimeEnd","EndTimeHashId",
                                  "NMI","QualityFlag","QualityFlagHashId","DLFCode","DLFValue","TNI","TLFValue","Status").pivot("role").agg(
                                            sum("prelfusage").alias("sum_prelfusage"),
                                            sum("postlfusage").alias("sum_postlfusage")

# Replace NULL values in usage
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_prelfusage':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_prelfusage':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'parentusage_sum_postlfusage':0})
df_usage = df_usage.na.fill({'childusage_sum_postlfusage':0})

# Children with negative usage is set to Zero
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_prelfusage",when(col("childusage_sum_prelfusage") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_prelfusage")))
df_usage = df_usage.withColumn("childusage_sum_postlfusage",when(col("childusage_sum_postlfusage") < 0, 0).otherwise(col("childusage_sum_postlfusage")))

# Parent NMI remaining usage =  Parent NMI total usage - sum of child NMI usage
df_billable_usage = df_usage.withColumn("BillableUsagePreLF",col('parentusage_sum_prelfusage')-col('childusage_sum_prelfusage'))
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("BillableUsagePostLF",col('parentusage_sum_postlfusage')-col('childusage_sum_postlfusage'))

# Add columns
df_billable_usage = df_billable_usage.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||","NMI"),256))
df_gold_final = df_billable_usage.select('NMI','NMIHashId','IntervalDate','DateHashId','IntervalLength','IntervalIndex','NormalizedTimeStart','StartTimeHashId','NormalizedTimeEnd','EndTimeHashId',
'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','DLFCode','DLFValue',col('TNI').alias('TLFCode'),'TLFValue','Status','BillableUsagePreLF','BillableUsagePostLF')

spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    NMI STRING,
    NMIHashId STRING,
    IntervalDate STRING, 
    DateHashId STRING,
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    StartTimeHashId STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    EndTimeHashId STRING,
    QualityFlag STRING,
    QualityFlagHashId STRING,
    Status STRING,
    DLFCode STRING,
    DLFValue DECIMAL(15,5),
    TLFCode STRING,
    TLFValue DECIMAL(15,5),
    BillableUsagePreLF DOUBLE,
    BillableUsagePostLF DOUBLE
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
    df_gold_final.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Gold_{db_tablename}""")

    # Use insert operation to update the target table
    spark.sql(f""" 
                INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
                    SELECT
                        NMI,
                        NMIHashId,
                        IntervalDate, 
                        DateHashId,
                        IntervalLength,
                        IntervalIndex,
                        NormalizedTimeStart,
                        StartTimeHashId,
                        NormalizedTimeEnd,
                        EndTimeHashId,
                        QualityFlag,
                        QualityFlagHashId,
                        Status,
                        DLFCode,
                        DLFValue,
                        TLFCode,
                        TLFValue,	                  
                        BillableUsagePreLF,
                        BillableUsagePostLF
                    FROM Gold_{db_tablename};

# Create a data frame for dedicated SQL server
df_gold_dsql = spark.sql(f""" 
                                SELECT
                                        NMI,
                                        NMIHashId,
                                        IntervalDate, 
                                        DateHashId,
                                        IntervalLength,
                                        IntervalIndex,
                                        NormalizedTimeStart,
                                        StartTimeHashId,
                                        NormalizedTimeEnd,
                                        EndTimeHashId,
                                        QualityFlag,
                                        QualityFlagHashId,
                                        Status,
                                        DLFCode,
                                        DLFValue,
                                        TLFCode,
                                        TLFValue,	                  
                                        BillableUsagePreLF, 
                                        BillableUsagePostLF
                                FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}

column_order = [
    "NMI",
    "NMIHashId",
    "IntervalDate",
    "DateHashId",
    "IntervalLength",
    "IntervalIndex",
    "NormalizedTimeStart",
    "StartTimeHashId",
    "NormalizedTimeEnd",
    "EndTimeHashId",
    "QualityFlag",
    "QualityFlagHashId",
    "Status",
	"DLFCode",
    "DLFValue",
	"TLFCode",
    "TLFValue",
	"BillableUsagePreLF",
    "BillableUsagePostLF",
    "LoadDate"

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

df_gold_dsql = df_gold_dsql.withColumn('LoadDate', to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))

#order columns for Azure Synapse insert should match synapse table creation order.
df_gold_dsql =  df_gold_dsql.select(*column_order)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
# Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
(df_gold_dsql.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode("overwrite")
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{db_tablename}"""))
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
#Row calculation
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_TotalRows,0,0,Gold_TotalRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table FactBillableUsage : END
